task: Move the brown bowl forward slightly
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown bowl sits on a dark surface. The bowl is a rigid container with a circular rim. STRATEGY - To move the bowl forward, first reach and grasp its rim for stability, then transport it horizontally to the new position. Failure modes include dropping the bowl or misaligning the grasp. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl at its rim; Step 2 grasp the rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport horizontally; Step 4 place gently.**
Goal: on(brown_bowl, surface); stable(brown_bowl)
Scene: brown_bowl, surface
Step 1: reach(brown_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the brown bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, brown_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, brown_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(brown_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the brown bowl
  contact: holding(brown_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(brown_bowl)
Step 3: transport(brown_bowl -> surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the surface in front of the bowl
  spatial: above(brown_bowl, surface, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(brown_bowl)
  done_when: above(brown_bowl, surface, 0.05)
Step 4: place(brown_bowl -> surface)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the surface in front of the bowl
  contact: surface_contact(brown_bowl, surface) [completion]; released(brown_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(brown_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(brown_bowl, surface) AND released(brown_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>
